tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Kingsley Coman’s brace powers Bayern Munich to 3-0 win) 2023/10/08 ESHEET

article.story:
Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman scored once in each half to lead the champions to a 3-0 win over visiting Freiburg on Sunday as they bounced back from last week's draw with RB Leipzig.

Goals from Coman and Leroy Sane in the first half put Bayern in the driving seat and France international Coman scored again after the interval.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

Bayern are third on 17 points, two behind leaders Bayer Leverkusen, who earlier beat Cologne 3-0.

Coman opened his account with a sensational goal in the 12th minute after picking up the ball and charging down the right wing.

The 27-year-old, almost at the sideline, looked set for a deep cross but instead floated the ball in off the far post from 25 metres out.

Sane quickly doubled their lead in the 25th and had another effort ruled out after a VAR review.

With Freiburg posing no threat at all, Bayern took their foot off the gas after the break but Coman should have scored again in the 78th minute but chose to lay the ball off for Mathys Tel who was offside.

Tel had replaced Bayern's top scorer Harry Kane in the 72nd minute.

Freiburg keeper Noah Atubolu tipped a shot by Leon Goretzka onto the crossbar in the 83rd but was beaten two minutes later when Coman's deflected shot made it 3-0.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  FC Bayern München 1, SC Freiburg 0. Kingsley Coman (FC Bayern München) right footed shot from a difficult angle and long range on the right to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Thomas Müller.
Noussair Mazraoui (FC Bayern München) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  FC Bayern München 2, SC Freiburg 0. Leroy Sané (FC Bayern München) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Harry Kane.
First Half ends, FC Bayern München 2, SC Freiburg 0.
Second Half begins FC Bayern München 2, SC Freiburg 0.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Maximilian Philipp replaces Merlin Röhl because of an injury.

Substitution, SC Freiburg. Junior Adamu replaces Lucas Höler.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Jamal Musiala replaces Thomas Müller.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Mathys Tel replaces Harry Kane.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Konrad Laimer replaces Dayot Upamecano.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Maximilian Breunig replaces Roland Sallai.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Fabian Rüdlin replaces Maximilian Eggestein.
Goal!  FC Bayern München 3, SC Freiburg 0. Kingsley Coman (FC Bayern München) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Konrad Laimer.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Eric Choupo-Moting replaces Kingsley Coman.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Frans Krätzig replaces Joshua Kimmich.
Second Half ends, FC Bayern München 3, SC Freiburg 0.
